files.name: image.component.ts
image.variants.ts
index.ts
files.content:
export { ImageComponent } from './image.component';
export type { ImageVariants } from './image.variants';

docs.overview:
# Image An image component built on Angular's `NgOptimizedImage` directive. Provides automatic lazy loading, LCP optimization, CDN loader support, skeleton placeholders, aspect ratio control, and fallback handling. ## Usage ```ts import { ImageComponent } from '@/components/image'; ``` ```html ``` ## Fill mode Use `nFill` to stretch the image to fill its parent container. The parent **must** have `position: relative` (or `absolute`/`fixed`) and explicit dimensions. ```html
``` ## Priority (above-the-fold) Mark hero images as priority to disable lazy loading and add `fetchpriority="high"`: ```html ``` ## CDN loaders Configure a loader once in `app.config.ts`. All `n-image` components in the app will use it automatically: ```ts import { provideImgixLoader } from '@angular/common'; export const appConfig: ApplicationConfig = { providers: [ provideImgixLoader('https://my-domain.imgix.net'), // or: provideCloudinaryLoader, provideImageKitLoader, provideNetlifyImageLoader ], }; ``` Then pass CDN-specific parameters via `nLoaderParams`: ```html ``` ## Fallback Provide a fallback URL or a custom template for broken images: ```html
Image unavailable
``` ## Skeleton A skeleton placeholder is shown by default while the image loads. Works best when combined with `nRatio` or `nFill` (so the wrapper has defined dimensions before the image loads). ```html ```
docs.api: # API ## ImageComponent (`n-image`) ### Inputs | Prop | Type | Default | Description | |------|------|---------|-------------| | `nSrc` | `string` | — | **Required.** Image URL passed to `ngSrc`. | | `nAlt` | `string` | — | **Required.** Alt text for accessibility. | | `nWidth` | `number` | `undefined` | Intrinsic width in pixels. Required when `nFill` is false. | | `nHeight` | `number` | `undefined` | Intrinsic height in pixels. Required when `nFill` is false. | | `nFill` | `boolean` | `false` | Fill parent container. Parent must have `position: relative` and defined dimensions. | | `nPriority` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables lazy loading, adds `fetchpriority="high"`. Use for above-the-fold images. | | `nSkeleton` | `boolean` | `true` | Show animated skeleton placeholder while loading. | | `nFallbackSrc` | `string` | `undefined` | Fallback image URL shown when `nSrc` fails to load. | | `nLoaderParams` | `Record` | `{}` | Extra parameters forwarded to the configured CDN loader. | | `nRatio` | `'auto' \| 'square' \| 'video' \| 'portrait' \| 'landscape'` | `'auto'` | Aspect ratio applied to the wrapper element. | | `nRounded` | `'none' \| 'sm' \| 'default' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' \| 'full'` | `'none'` | Border radius applied to the wrapper element. | | `nFit` | `'cover' \| 'contain' \| 'fill' \| 'none'` | `'cover'` | Object-fit applied to the `` element. | | `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes applied to the wrapper element. | ### Outputs | Event | Type | Description | |-------|------|-------------| | `nLoad` | `void` | Emits when the image finishes loading. | | `nError` | `void` | Emits when the image fails to load. | ### Content projection | Selector | Description | |----------|-------------| | `[nImageFallback]` | Custom fallback template rendered when `nSrc` fails and `nFallbackSrc` is not set. Should be positioned absolutely (`absolute inset-0`) to fill the wrapper. | ### Data slots | Slot | Element | Description | |------|---------|-------------| | `root` | `div` | Outer wrapper with aspect ratio, rounding, and overflow hidden. | | `skeleton` | `div` | Animated placeholder shown while image loads. | | `fallback` | `img` | Fallback image rendered when using `nFallbackSrc`. |
